steps.title: Compare authorship methods
steps.content: Text 1 says Graves recognized Fletcher's contributions because Fletcher had a distinct style. Text 2 says modern scholars also assign parts of the play on the basis of style.

steps.title: Exclude unsupported claims
steps.content: B discusses women characters in Fletcher and Massinger, which neither text compares. C would conflict with Graves's rejection of Shakespeare's coauthorship. D invents a Massinger homage to Shakespeare. The answer is A.
